description: Style Note adidas helps you ignore the discomforts and keep dry and comfortable. These T-shirts, engineered with Climalite technology,  also offer you a stylised look that is most flattering. Pair it with a pair of jeans and sports shoes on your day off for a day out in the sun or with shorts and Sports shoes when you are paying the gym or the field a visit. Product Details Black sleeveless jersey, has a round neckline, graphic print on chest, Adidas patented three stripes on the sides and a maroon coloured liningMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash below 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not soak, tumble dry, bleach or dry cleanDry in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
